methods.name: MarketParamsLib.id
methods.desc: @notice Returns the id of the market `marketParams`.

methods.name: UtilsLib.exactlyOneZero
methods.desc: @dev Returns true if there is exactly one zero among `x` and `y`.

methods.name: MathLib.wTaylorCompounded
methods.desc:
@dev Returns the sum of the first three non-zero terms of a Taylor expansion of e^(nx) - 1, to approximate a
 continuous compound interest rate.

methods.desc: @dev Calculates the value of `shares` quoted in assets, rounding up.
